prestazioni: Reinz MLS head gaskets (0.6mm) for the 5.0L V10 (FGT engine code) to safely increase compression ratio to 12.8:1, paired with forged Mahle Motorsport pistons (9.5:1 CR base) and Carrillo H-beam connecting rods for 9,000 RPM reliability in endurance racing conditions

Motec M190 ECU with custom GT3-spec lambda and knock control maps, integrated with a Pectel SQ6M dash logger and Bosch Motorsport MS4.0 ignition coils for individual cylinder timing adjustments and real-time fuel mixture optimization under 24-hour race loads

KW 3-way Clubsport coilovers (GT3-spec valving) with spherical bearing top mounts, adjustable camber plates, and 400 lbs/in front / 500 lbs/in rear spring rates, paired with Lamborghini Motorsport OEM GT3-spec anti-roll bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) and spherical bearing end links for precise turn-in response on Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (305/655-R18 front, 325/705-R18 rear)
estetica: Rocket Bunny GT3-widebody kit (carbon fiber, 50mm front / 70mm rear fender extensions) with integrated GT3-spec dive planes and a custom 3D-printed ABS rear diffuser for improved high-speed stability, matched to a Lamborghini Squadra Corse GT3 rear wing (carbon fiber, 1,200mm span, 300mm chord) with adjustable Gurney flaps

OMP GT3-spec carbon fiber racing seats (FIA 8862-2009 certified) with Schroth 6-point harnesses and a custom MOMO GT3 steering wheel (380mm diameter, Alcantara-wrapped, integrated Motec display), paired with a Lamborghini Motorsport GT3-spec roll cage (T45 steel, 4-point harness bar, integrated fire suppression system)

Custom livery by Driving Line Designs featuring a matte Grigio Titans base with fluorescent Verde Mantis accents, GT3-spec LED headlights (Hella 90mm Bi-Xenon projectors), and a carbon fiber engine cover with a clear polycarbonate window to showcase the FGT V10, finished with Lamborghini Squadra Corse GT3 decals and Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R branding
